hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(f&&/\.env(\\.local|\\.development\\.local|\\.test\\.local|\\.production\\.local)?$/.test(f)&&!/\\.env\\.example$/.test(f)){console.error('BLOCKED: Cannot write to .env files with secrets: '+f);process.exit(1)}}catch(e){}})" 2>&1 || exit 1

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(f&&!/\\.kiro\\/specs\\//.test(f)&&/\\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/.test(f)){const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root='/home/timothy/Projects';const specCheck=()=>{const files=fs.readdirSync(root).filter(f=>/\\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/.test(f));const changedFiles=files.filter(file=>{try{const content=fs.readFileSync(path.join(root,file),'utf8');return content.includes('TODO')||content.includes('FIXME')||content.includes('HACK')||content.length>1000;}catch(e){return false;}});if(changedFiles.length>1){const specs=fs.readdirSync(path.join(root,'.kiro/specs')).filter(d=>fs.statSync(path.join(root,'.kiro/specs',d)).isDirectory());if(specs.length===0){console.error('BLOCKED: Multi-file change requires spec-driven workflow. Create .kiro/specs/{feature-slug}/ first.');process.exit(1);}}}};try{specCheck();}catch(e){}}catch(e){}})" 2>&1 || exit 1

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=j.tool_input?.command||'';const blocked=[/rm\\s+-rf\\s+\\//,/git\\s+push\\s+.*--force.*main/,/git\\s+push\\s+.*--force.*master/,/npm\\s+install/,/npm\\s+i\\s/,/yarn\\s+add/,/yarn\\s+install/];if(blocked.some(r=>r.test(cmd))){console.error('BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected: '+cmd);process.exit(1)}}catch(e){}})" 2>&1 || exit 1
